steps.title: Convert the percent
steps.content: A percent means out of $100$, so $4\%=\frac{4}{100}=0.04$.

steps.title: Take 4 percent of 350
steps.content: Multiply the total number of objects by the decimal form of the percent: $$0.04(350)=14.$$

steps.title: Confirm the count
steps.content: The question asks for the number of spheres, and $4\%$ of $350$ objects is $14$ objects. Therefore there are 14 spheres in the bag.
